slug.title: Slug
slug.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the mode (e.g. my-mode)

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable display name for the mode. May include an emoji prefix.

description.title: Description
description.description: Short summary of what this mode does, shown in the mode picker.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Tool permission groups this mode has access to. Controls which tools are available when the mode is active.

whenToUse.title: When To Use
whenToUse.description: Guidance for the orchestrator on when to activate this mode. Used by Bob to route requests to the right mode.

roleDefinition.title: Role Definition
roleDefinition.description: System prompt that defines the mode's persona and responsibilities. This text is injected as the role definition when the mode is activated.
